name: @univerkit/verso-repo
description: A focused release CLI for JavaScript workspace packages.
author: DreamNum Co., Ltd. <developer@univer.ai>

scripts.precommit: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:scripts && pnpm run check:rust && pnpm run check:npm
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test --locked --all
scripts.format: oxfmt --write scripts packages/verso/src packages/verso/scripts && cargo fmt
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check scripts packages/verso/src packages/verso/scripts && cargo fmt --check
